content: Try looking at addressbook pane and see if you have a caldav addressbook. Remove it and the prompt should go away.
creator: davidsk

content: The message indicates the authentication may be wrong. If in doubt, post a screenshot of the server settings pane and maybe someone will have suggestions. thank you.
creator: davidsk

content:
Hello there Stacylanders.



I don’t know what computer you use, but you can use the Proton Mail Bridge app. Insert your account, and choose or get a username and password—not the normal credentials from your regular account—and go to that email client, Thunderbird, and provide them with these bridge credentials, such as the password and username

Greetings googlethunderbird.
creator: Googlethunderbird.
